headline: Is Republic Services, Inc. (RSG) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is RSG a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Republic Services, Inc. on r/investing_discussion by Variant_Invest. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on RSG. Republic Services, Inc.’s share was trading at $207.05 as of May 26th. RSG’s trailing and forward P/E were 29.71 and 28.82 respectively according to Yahoo […]
